# ner-dataset — NER benchmark gold artifacts (marfago-labs)

> Committed JSONL datasets + published integrity statistics.

## Start here

- README.md — layout, reproduce/cite, monorepo wiring
- datasets/README.md — file inventory (engines, regen commands)
- docs/for-agents.md — artifact repo notes for coding agents

## Machine-readable stats

- docs/stats.json — document/entity counts, engines, gold_integrity
- docs/index.html — GitHub Pages dashboard (marfago-labs.github.io/ner-dataset)

## Regenerate

Use ner-gold-generator with configs in generate/*.yaml — see datasets/README.md.

## Sibling repos

- https://github.com/marfago-labs/ner-gold-generator — builds gold (llms.txt)
- https://github.com/marfago-labs/ner-detector — evaluates gold (llms.txt)
